response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience with strong recent exposure to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent requirement. Background spans backend, frontend, mobile, embedded, and DevOps, plus a CS bachelor's. Gaps around Nest.js and Vitest are minor given the breadth of comparable framework and testing experience.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI agent / MCP work at re:cinq matches a specific job requirement
Deep full-stack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/K8s
Strong engineering craft signals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, OSS projects
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the resume
Heavy historical investment in DLang may indicate preference for niche stacks over primary TS/Node ecosystem
Title trajectory (Staff -> Senior -> Staff) is non-linear and may warrant clarification on scope
